topPlaces.name: Chungthang
topPlaces.description: Chungthang is a town in Mangan district in the Indian state of Sikkim. It is located just 28 km from Mangan town, the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Lachen River
topPlaces.description: The Lachen River is a tributary of the Teesta River in the state of Sikkim, India. It is one of the two main tributaries of the Teesta along with the Lachung River, which rise on opposite sides of the Donga Range in neighbouring Bhutan and converge in Chungthang in the North Sikkim district.

topPlaces.name: Chungthang Forest Block
topPlaces.description: Chungthang Forest Block is a village in Chungthang subdivision, North Sikkim district, Sikkim, India. The Ministry of Home Affairs has given it a geographical code of 260867.

topPlaces.description: Shipgyer is a village in Chungthang subdivision, North Sikkim district, Sikkim, India. The Ministry of Home Affairs has given it a geographical code of 260862.

topPlaces.name: Tung, Sikkim
topPlaces.description: Tung is a village in the Chungthang subdivision of North Sikkim district in the north Indian state of Sikkim. The Ministry of Home Affairs has given it a geographical code of 260863.

items.note: Chungthang is a town in Mangan district in the Indian state of Sikkim. It is located just 28 km from Mangan town, the district headquarters.

The Lachen River is a tributary of the Teesta River in the state of Sikkim, India. It is one of the two main tributaries of the Teesta along with the Lachung River, which rise on opposite sides of the Donga Range in neighbouring Bhutan and converge in Chungthang in the North Sikkim district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Nanaklama?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Nanaklama is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Nanaklama?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Nanaklama?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Nanaklama at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Nanaklama?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Nanaklama start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Nanaklama?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chungthang, Lachen River, Chungthang Forest Block, Shipgyer, Naga-Namgor.
